meta.description: Simulation module registry — read by numerics.html to auto-populate dashboard

modules.label: Module 01 — RSS Finder & Markovian Crossing
modules.description: Computes the reduced steady state (RSS), Liouvillian spectrum, RSS diagnostic check, first Mpemba crossing pair (Markovian), and Lamb-Dicke correction scan.
key_results: Mpemba crossing found at t* ≈ 7.5 — requires transverse Bloch components
Purely longitudinal state pairs show NO crossing in Markovian limit
LD correction (η ≤ 0.20) does not shift crossing time
open_questions: Does non-Markovian bath produce persistent (not oscillatory) crossing?
What is the full geometry of the Mpemba manifold on the Bloch sphere?
How does crossing structure change with coupling g and bath temperature?

modules.label: Module 02 — Bloch Sphere Scan (Mpemba Manifold)
modules.description: Full Bloch sphere scan mapping which initial-state pairs produce a Mpemba crossing. Identifies the crossing manifold and its dependence on system parameters.
open_questions: What is the codimension of the Mpemba manifold?
Is there a simple spectral condition (c₁ = 0) that predicts it?

modules.label: Module 03 — Parameter Scan (g, T, γ)
modules.description: Systematic scan over coupling strength g, motional temperature (n̄), and bath rate γ. Maps crossing time t* and crossing depth across parameter space.
open_questions: At what coupling strength g does the crossing become experimentally resolvable?
How does t* scale with τ_bath = 1/γ?

modules.label: Module 04 — Non-Markovian Extension (HEOM)
modules.description: Hierarchical equations of motion (HEOM) for a Drude-Lorentz bath spectral density. Tests the Strachan et al. (PRL 134, 220403) prediction: bath memory produces qualitatively new crossing structure.
open_questions: Does non-Markovian bath produce a persistent (not transient) Mpemba crossing?
How does crossing time t* scale with bath memory time τ_bath = 1/γ_bath?
Is the crossing robust against realistic spectral densities?

status_legend.needs_quality_check: Simulation complete. Results need scientific review before interpretation.
status_legend.planned: Module designed, script not yet run.
status_legend.reviewed: Results reviewed and annotated by stewards.
